requested_action: Independently review the fixed M7 app shell implementation against task acceptance criteria, allowed/forbidden paths, player/debug separation, i18n behavior, read-model authority boundaries, Storybook/Playwright coverage, and Electron-facing residual risk.

delivery.note: QA reviewer was spawned with the full route context; parent lead will also send a compact persisted route message after this file is committed.

shell remains read-model/presentation coordinator and does not own authoritative WorldState

no release/commercial/branding/final art/telemetry/server/multiplayer/account/cloud save/manual node battle scope
